basic_details.job_title: Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Archivist, Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Gujarat Vidyapith, Ahmedabad (Deemed to be University)
basic_details.post_name: Doctor-Naturopathy, Curator, Account Officer, Archivist, Museum Coordinator, Engineer (Civil) etc.
basic_details.job_type: Contractual (11 months) - Purely temporary, no other benefits
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Vidyapith is inviting applications for 7 Administrative Posts on a purely contractual (11 months) basis. This is a great opportunity for qualified professionals in Naturopathy, Museum Management, Finance, Archival Studies, and Civil Engineering.

application_fee.details: Rs. 500/- per post (Online mode only) SC/ST/PwBD/EWS candidates may check notification for any concession (generally non-refundable for all).

age_limit.details: Age limit is not explicitly mentioned in the notification for these contractual posts. However, candidates are expected to meet the experience requirements which implicitly indicate suitable age groups. Relaxation may apply as per university norms/Government of India guidelines for reserved categories (check notification).

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all criteria as on 25.07.2026. Detailed eligibility is provided in the official notification. Key requirements include relevant educational qualifications, experience in reputed institutions, and proficiency as per post.

vacancy_details.Key Eligibility Highlights: BNYS Degree + Valid License + 3 years experience
BNYS Degree + Valid License + 3 years experience + Proficiency in botanical medicine, nutrition, hydrotherapy etc.
Master’s in History/Museum Studies + 2 years museum experience
CA / CMA / MBA(Finance)/M.Com (55%) + 5 years post-qualification experience in Finance/Accounts
PG Diploma in Archival Studies (55%) + 3 years exp. OR Master’s in Archaeology/History + 3 years museum exp.
First Class B.E./B.Tech (Civil) + 5 years experience in relevant field (Solid Waste, Structural, Estate Maintenance etc.)

post_wise_breakdown.key_eligibility_highlights: BNYS Degree + Valid License + 3 years experience
BNYS Degree + Valid License + 3 years experience + Proficiency in botanical medicine, nutrition, hydrotherapy etc.
Master’s in History/Museum Studies + 2 years museum experience
CA / CMA / MBA(Finance)/M.Com (55%) + 5 years post-qualification experience in Finance/Accounts
PG Diploma in Archival Studies (55%) + 3 years exp. OR Master’s in Archaeology/History + 3 years museum exp.
First Class B.E./B.Tech (Civil) + 5 years experience in relevant field (Solid Waste, Structural, Estate Maintenance etc.)

selection_process: Selection will be based on Interview (Hybrid mode). Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email/website. Final selection is subject to verification of documents
and suitability. The university reserves the right to cancel or modify the process at any stage.
how_to_apply: Fill online application in English or Gujarati (Personal details → Education → Experience → Payment → Declaration).
Submit and take printout for interview.
Documents Required: Educational certificates, experience letters, photo, ID proof, caste certificate (if applicable), etc.
important_instructions: Posts are purely temporary (11 months) with no claim for permanent absorption. No Hard Copy to be sent by post. Candidates can apply for multiple posts with separate applications & fees. Interview in Hybrid mode; bring printed application + originals at interview. University reserves right to increase/decrease posts or cancel recruitment. No TA/DA will be paid. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate.

content_sections.heading: Gujarat Vidyapith Ahmedabad Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Gujarat Vidyapith, Ahmedabad (Deemed to be University) has issued Notification No. 07/Estt./2026-27 dated 15.07.2026 for engagement of various Administrative Posts on contractual basis for 11 months. The notification covers complete details on posts, eligibility criteria, pay scales, application process, important instructions, and Annexure-I guidelines. Candidates are advised to read the full notification carefully before applying. The recruitment emphasizes the institution’s core values of truth, non-violence, rural reconstruction, and education in the mother tongue (Gujarati). Download Gujarat Vidyapith Administrative Posts Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Gujarat Vidyapith Ahmedabad Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Gujarat Vidyapith is inviting applications for 7 Administrative Posts on a purely contractual (11 months) basis. This is a great opportunity for qualified professionals in Naturopathy, Museum Management, Finance, Archival Studies, and Civil Engineering.

rows.gujarat_vidyapith_ahmedabad_deemed_to_be: Doctor-Naturopathy, Curator, Account Officer, Archivist, Museum Coordinator, Engineer (Civil) etc.
Contractual (11 months) - Purely temporary, no other benefits

content_sections.heading: Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 Vacancy & Post Details
content_sections.text: A total of 07 posts are announced on contractual basis. Details are as follows: Pay Scale (Monthly Fixed Amount): Doctor-Naturopathy (Randheja): Rs. 60,000/- (with Accommodation) Curator: Rs. 60,000/- Account Officer: Rs. 55,000/- Other Posts (Doctor Ahmedabad, Archivist, Museum Coordinator, Engineer): Rs. 50,000/-

rows.key_eligibility_highlights: BNYS Degree + Valid License + 3 years experience
BNYS Degree + Valid License + 3 years experience + Proficiency in botanical medicine, nutrition, hydrotherapy etc.
Master’s in History/Museum Studies + 2 years museum experience
CA / CMA / MBA(Finance)/M.Com (55%) + 5 years post-qualification experience in Finance/Accounts
PG Diploma in Archival Studies (55%) + 3 years exp. OR Master’s in Archaeology/History + 3 years museum exp.
First Class B.E./B.Tech (Civil) + 5 years experience in relevant field (Solid Waste, Structural, Estate Maintenance etc.)

content_sections.heading: Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all criteria as on 25.07.2026. Detailed eligibility is provided in the official notification. Key requirements include relevant educational qualifications, experience in reputed institutions, and proficiency as per post.

content_sections.heading: Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age limit is not explicitly mentioned in the notification for these contractual posts. However, candidates are expected to meet the experience requirements which implicitly indicate suitable age groups. Relaxation may apply as per university norms/Government of India guidelines for reserved categories (check notification).

content_sections.heading: Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: Rs. 500/- per post (Online mode only) SC/ST/PwBD/EWS candidates may check notification for any concession (generally non-refundable for all).

content_sections.heading: Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on Interview (Hybrid mode). Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email/website. Final selection is subject to verification of documents, experience, and suitability. The university reserves the right to cancel or modify the process at any stage.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit official website: www.gujaratvidyapith.org Go to Recruitment / Careers section. Register with valid email ID. Fill online application in English or Gujarati (Personal details → Education → Experience → Payment → Declaration). Upload scanned documents (PDF <500 KB). Pay Rs.500/- application fee. Submit and take printout for interview. Documents Required: Educational certificates, experience letters, photo, ID proof, caste certificate (if applicable), etc. Apply Online: Available on www.gujaratvidyapith.org For queries: [email protected]

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: Posts are purely temporary (11 months) with no claim for permanent absorption. No Hard Copy to be sent by post. Candidates can apply for multiple posts with separate applications & fees. Interview in Hybrid mode; bring printed application + originals at interview. University reserves right to increase/decrease posts or cancel recruitment. No TA/DA will be paid. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application submission is 25 July 2026 (up to 01:00 PM). The application window opened on 17 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many posts are announced in Gujarat Vidyapith Administrative Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 07 contractual posts including Doctor-Naturopathy (2), Curator, Account Officer, Archivist, Museum Coordinator, and Engineer (Civil).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Account Officer in Gujarat Vidyapith 2026?
faq.answer: The monthly fixed pay for Account Officer is Rs. 55,000/-. Doctor (Randheja) and Curator get Rs. 60,000/- (with accommodation for one).

faq.question: Q4. Is Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: All posts are purely temporary and contractual for 11 months only. No other benefits or absorption guarantee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for Gujarat Vidyapith jobs 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must pay Rs. 500/- per post through online mode. Fee is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the eligibility for Doctor-Naturopathy post at Gujarat Vidyapith?
faq.answer: BNYS degree from recognized university, valid license, and minimum 3 years clinical experience.

faq.question: Q7. When will the interview be conducted for Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment?
faq.answer: Tentative interview dates are 29 and 30 July 2026 in Hybrid mode.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply online for Gujarat Vidyapith Ahmedabad Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Visit www.gujaratvidyapith.org → Recruitment section → Fill form in English/Gujarati → Upload documents → Pay fee → Submit.

faq.question: Q9. Is experience mandatory for all posts in this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, minimum 2–5 years of relevant post-qualification experience is required depending on the post.

faq.question: Q10. Will there be any written exam for Gujarat Vidyapith Administrative Posts 2026?
faq.answer: No written exam. Selection is based on Interview only, followed by document verification.
